meta.homeDescription: A digital threshold into experience. The Field.

home.fieldIsYou: The Field is you. You are The Field.
home.whatFieldBody: A space of resonance. Not an explanation—a meeting. What you feel as you arrive is the beginning.
home.erpaBody: The structure in which the field lives—careful, precise, humane.
home.exploreSubtitle: Pointers into origin, the place, applications, and movement.

pages.originLead: Where the vision begins. A journey into openness—felt, not over-explained.
pages.theFieldLead: What it is. How it is experienced. What it may open—with lightness and without claims.
pages.maisonLead: The place. Field Journeys: Ether, Water, Dual. Individual sessions · Freqwave Yoga.
pages.accessLead: Intake, then approval and your path to booking.
pages.applicationsLead: Night Fields · festivals · corporate · art installations.
pages.artLead: From Renaissance to Resonance. Frequency art.
pages.livingLead: Voices from the field—stories, events, film.
pages.shopLead: Frequency art · objects · event pieces. Request via email.
pages.privacyBody: Placeholder only—not legal advice. At launch: processing purposes, retention, subprocessors, and how to exercise rights. Intake and request flows from Phase A2 will have their own section.

common.comingSoonNote: Phase A1 • content will come from the CMS.

accessForm.hint: Intake rows are saved to SQLite while developing. Later: Postgres, email alerts, approvals.
accessForm.name: Name
accessForm.intentPrompt: Briefly describe why Maison de Resonance is relevant to you now, what you seek to open, and in which context (personal, practice, performance, team).
accessForm.intentPlaceholder: For example: why now, what do you hope to open, and how does this fit your path?
accessForm.success: Received. We'll read your words with care.

validation.nameTooShort: Add your full name (at least 2 characters).
validation.intentTooShort: Write at least two sentences—we need to sense your resonance.

notFound.title: This path does not exist—or it lives in another field.
notFound.body: Placeholder; will be refined when CMS content is available.

art.label: Art & Music
art.body: From DJ sets to installations: frequency as an artistic layer that helps space, audience, and performer resonate together.

sport.label: Sport & Performance
sport.body: For athletes and teams seeking structured support for focus, recovery, and high-performance progression.

hospitality.label: Hospitality & F&B
hospitality.body: For venues and experience concepts where atmosphere, rhythm, and guest experience are central.

wellbeing.label: Wellbeing
wellbeing.body: For practices and facilitators working with intention around rest, self-care, and inner alignment.

maison.entryRule: Maison de Resonance is strictly by appointment. Access starts through Request Access.
maison.journeys: Journeys: Ether, Water, and Dual in a homelike and discreet setting.
maison.privateSessions: Individual sessions and tracks shaped by intention, not volume.
maison.freqwave: Freqwave Yoga and additional moments in small groups.

accessPage.intro: This threshold works both ways: your intention and our alignment together decide whether this is the right moment.
accessPage.step1: Step 1: share your context and intention.
accessPage.step2: Step 2: we review with care and clarity.
accessPage.step3: Step 3: if aligned, you receive access to the next step.
